detaileddescription.para: Default Constructor

memberdef.argsstring: (float cosThetaBy2, float iBySineTheta, float jBySineTheta, float kBySineTheta)
memberdef.name: Quaternion

briefdescription.para: Constructs from a quaternion represented by floats.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
cosThetaBy2
iBySineTheta
jBySineTheta
kBySineTheta

briefdescription.para: Constructs from a quaternion represented by a vector.
Constructor from an axis and angle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
angle
The angle around the axis
axis
The vector of the axis

@SINCE_1_0.0
pitch
yaw
roll

@SINCE_1_0.0
matrix

@SINCE_1_0.0
xAxis
The X axis
yAxis
The Y axis
zAxis
The Z axis

briefdescription.para: Constructs quaternion which describes minimum rotation to align v0 with v1. @SINCE_1_0.0.

simplesect.para: v0 and v1 should be normalized

briefdescription.para: Destructor, nonvirtual as this is not a base class.

detaileddescription.para: @SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: Helper to check if this is an identity quaternion.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
True if this is identity quaternion

briefdescription.para: Converts the quaternion to an axis/angle pair.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
axis
angle
Angle in radians
True if converted correctly

briefdescription.para: Returns the quaternion as a vector.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The vector representation of the quaternion

briefdescription.para: SetEuler sets the quaternion from the Euler angles applied in x, y, z order.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
pitch
yaw
roll

briefdescription.para: Returns the Euler angles from a rotation Quaternion.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
A vector of Euler angles (x == pitch, y == yaw, z == roll)

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The quaternion to add
A quaternion containing the result of the addition

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The quaternion to subtract
A quaternion containing the result of the subtract

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The quaternion to multiply
A quaternion containing the result

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The vector to multiply
A vector containing the result of the multiplication

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
A quaternion to divide by
A quaternion containing the result

@SINCE_1_0.0
scale
A value to scale by
A quaternion containing the result

@SINCE_1_0.0
scale
A value to scale by
A quaternion containing the result

@SINCE_1_0.0
A quaternion containing the negated result

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The quaternion to add
A reference to this

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The quaternion to subtract
A reference to this

@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The quaternion to multiply
A reference to this

@SINCE_1_0.0
scale
the value to scale by
A reference to this

@SINCE_1_0.0
scale
The value to scale by
A reference to this

@SINCE_1_0.0
rhs
The quaternion to compare with
True if the quaternions are equal

@SINCE_1_0.0
rhs
The quaternion to compare with
True if the quaternions are not equal

briefdescription.para: Returns the length of the quaternion.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The length of the quaternion

briefdescription.para: Returns the squared length of the quaternion.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The squared length of the quaternion
@SINCE_1_0.0

@SINCE_1_0.0
A normalized version of this quaternion
@SINCE_1_0.0
@SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: Performs the logarithm of a Quaternion = v*a where q = (cos(a),v*sin(a)).

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
A quaternion representing the logarithm

@SINCE_1_0.0
A quaternion representing the exponent

briefdescription.para: Rotates v by this Quaternion (Quaternion must be unit).

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
vector
A vector to rotate
The rotated vector

briefdescription.para: Rotates v by this Quaternion (Quaternion must be unit).

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
vector
A vector to rotate
The rotated vector

briefdescription.para: Returns the dot product of two quaternions.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
q1
The first quaternion
q2
The second quaternion
The dot product of the two quaternions

briefdescription.para: Linear Interpolation (using a straight line between the two quaternions).

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
q1
The start quaternion
q2
The end quaternion
t
A progress value between 0 and 1
The interpolated quaternion

briefdescription.para: Spherical Linear Interpolation (using the shortest arc of a great circle between the two quaternions).

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
q1
The start quaternion
q2
The end quaternion
progress
A progress value between 0 and 1
The interpolated quaternion

inbodydescription.para: If cos(theta) < 0, q1 and q2 are more than 90 degrees apart, so invert one to reduce spinning.

briefdescription.para: This version of Slerp, used by Squad, does not check for theta > 90.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
q1
The start quaternion
q2
The end quaternion
t
A progress value between 0 and 1
The interpolated quaternion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Quaternion &start, const Quaternion &end, const Quaternion &ctrl1, const Quaternion &ctrl2, float t)
memberdef.name: Squad

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
start
The start quaternion
end
The end quaternion
ctrl1
The control quaternion for q1
ctrl2
The control quaternion for q2
t
A progress value between 0 and 1
The interpolated quaternion

briefdescription.para: Returns the shortest angle between two quaternions in Radians.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
q1
The first quaternion
q2
The second quaternion
The angle between the two quaternions

briefdescription.para: The Quaternion class encapsulates the mathematics of the quaternion. @SINCE_1_0.0.
